description: Create a content slide with a left sidebar and a main-area horizontal process timeline showing the development of electric and electrified aviation, including milestone years, aircraft use cases, and three bottom callout implications.

header.headline: Electric vehicles are a common sight today, but the aviation sector faces major challenges in decarbonization and electrification

steps.label: Electric air taxi – first manned flights
Electric air taxi enter service for urban mobility
Market entry of small hybrid-electric aircraft for business or commercial use

items.text: Three highlighted implication callouts are shown beneath the timeline
